---
title: "Indicators"
format:
  html:
    fig-dpi: 200
    code-fold: true
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
warnings: false
execute:
  cache: true
  eval: false
---

## Aggregation

Combining data at indicator level, normalizing from 0 to 1 in the process. We are also reducing our metric set to the variables that can be given a clear normative value.

Here is our metric framework with desirable directions from OneDrive excel sheet:

```{r}
#| label: desirable_refresh_table
meta %>% 
  select(dimension, index, indicator, variable_name, desirable) %>% 
  get_reactable()
```

The only thing I might think about dropping here at this point is annual precipitation. Seems fraught to say that more is good without accounting for extreme weather events. Let's leave them for now.

Steps for aggregation:

* 

```{r}

```
